tagline: Supervisor Agent now supports long running task mode, which automatically breaks complex tasks into multiple request/response cycles using task continuation to avoid timeouts.
what_it_does: Supervisor Agent now supports long running task mode, which automatically breaks complex tasks into multiple request/response cycles using task continuation to avoid timeouts. This page explains how to handle long running tasks using task continuation with Supervisor Agent. When a supervisor agent works on complex tasks that require many tool calls, the task might need more time than a single API request allows.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Supervisor Agent now supports long running task mode, which automatically breaks complex tasks into multiple request/response cycles using task continuation to avoid timeouts.
